title: All The Maus 1
description: An epic adventure awaits with many bosses, dimensions and biomes!
body:
An amazing adventure awaits you in All The Maus 1!

All The Maus 1 uses FancyMenu to make the main menu screen much better!

Includes Sodium for better performance and Iris to make your game better with shaders!


This modpack features many mods, bosses, dimensions and biomes for you to explore.

Mods such as Terralith, Advent of Ascension make this the most adventurous modpack you could imagine!

Do you like knowing the point of the game you're at? Well, the Day Counter mod got you covered for this, it counts the days and displays your co-ords above your hotbar so you don't need to open the F3 menu for everything!

Key mods (very epic)
- Advent of Ascension
- Terralith
- Additional Structures
- NOTD (None of the Dairy)
- All public creamers inc. mods

Stop reading this and get started!
